name: clinical-kb
description: Repo guidance for Clinical KB, a Next.js clinical reference RAG app.

interface.longDescription: Clinical KB provides repo-specific Codex guidance for local server safety, Next.js 16 conventions, Supabase project safety, no-API verification, clinical governance checks, and focused verification choices.
